publishedAbstract: When `ODF Multicluster Orchestrator` and `Openshift DR Hub Operator` are upgraded from `4.17.z` to `4.18.0`, some of the Disaster Recovery resources are misconfigured in case of internal mode ODF deployment. This impacts Disaster Recovery of workloads using "**ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd**" and "**ocs-storagecluster-ceph-rbd-virtualization**" StorageClasses.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation Disaster Recovery misconfigured after upgrade from ODF v4.17.z to ODF v4.18.0
